task: Compute the 90th percentile of the latencies in data/logs/oss04.csv and say whether it breaches the 50ms SLO.

single_shot.answer: Based on a typical Lustre OST baseline of ~12ms p99, the p90 write latency is probably around 18ms, which would be within the 50ms SLO. (Note: I cannot see the file contents, so this is an estimate.)

closed_loop.answer: I read data/logs/oss04.csv and computed numpy.percentile(latency_ms, 90) = 51.09 ms. That BREACHES the 50 ms SLO.
